# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type EdgeConfigValue = string | number | boolean | null | Record<string, unknown> | unknown[];

const DEFAULTS = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
};

function asString(value: EdgeConfigValue | undefined, fallback: string): string {
  return typeof value === 'string' && value.length > 0 ? value : fallback;
}

function asBoolean(value: EdgeConfigValue | undefined, fallback = false): boolean {
  return typeof value === 'boolean' ? value : fallback;
}

function asRecord(value: EdgeConfigValue | undefined): Record<string, unknown> | undefined {
  if (value && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) return value as Record<string, unknown>;
  return undefined;
}

async function readEdgeConfig() {
  const hasEdgeConfig = typeof process !== 'undefined' && !!process.env?.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!hasEdgeConfig) {
    return {
      apiKey: DEFAULTS.API_KEY,
      dbUrl: DEFAULTS.DB_URL,
      featureFlags: {} as Record<string, boolean>,
      raw: { API_KEY: DEFAULTS.API_KEY, DB_URL: DEFAULTS.DB_URL, FEATURE_FLAGS: {} },
      source: 'defaults',
    };
  }

  const [apiKeyVal, dbUrlVal, featureFlagsVal] = await Promise.all([
    get('API_KEY'),
    get('DB_URL'),
    get('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
  ]);

  const featureFlagsObj = asRecord(featureFlagsVal) ?? {};
  const featureFlags: Record<string, boolean> = {};
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(featureFlagsObj)) featureFlags[k] = asBoolean(v as EdgeConfigValue, false);

  const apiKey = asString(apiKeyVal, DEFAULTS.API_KEY);
  const dbUrl = asString(dbUrlVal, DEFAULTS.DB_URL);

  return {
    apiKey,
    dbUrl,
    featureFlags,
    raw: { API_KEY: apiKeyVal ?? null, DB_URL: dbUrlVal ?? null, FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlagsVal ?? null },
    source: 'edge-config',
  };
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (req.method !== 'GET') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  const cfg = await readEdgeConfig();

  const response = {
    ok: true,
    source: cfg.source,
    apiKey: cfg.apiKey,
    dbUrl: cfg.dbUrl,
    featureFlags: cfg.featureFlags,
    edgeConfigPresent: !!process.env?.EDGE_CONFIG,
    path: url.pathname,
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(response, null, 2), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
  });
}
